Description: Pre-certified BLE 5 nRF52840 module (1MB flash 256KB RAM)
16-bit ADC PGA I2C for Hall sensor digitization
Analog ratiometric linear Hall effect sensor SOT-23
Hermetically sealed reed switch for external mode
Marine cable gland for sensor head cable
N52 neodymium magnet 2x2x1mm for valve B
SPI mode microSD card socket for logging
868/915 MHz whip antenna with SMA connector + IP67
Titanium spring clip for mussel shell attachment
IP68 potted sensor head with epoxy marine grade
